articles.headline: 2026 Winter Olympics: Best moments from Sunday in Milan Cortina
articles.description: On Sunday at the Winter Olympics, Mikaela Shiffrin skied, pairs figure skating started and USA men's hockey beat Germany.

images.name: Mikaela Shiffrin [1296x729]
images.caption: Mikaela Shiffrin is back in action in the giant slalom.

images.name: Noah Hanifin: U.S men's hockey is a 'work in progress'
images.caption: Emily Kaplan talks with Noah Hanifin, Matt Boldy and Jake Guentzel following the U.S men's hockey team's 6-3 win over Denmark.

articles.headline: 2026 Winter Olympics: Look back at Saturday's action from Milan Cortina
articles.description: Saturday at the Winter Olympics includes Team USA men's hockey winning against Denmark and USA curling round-robins.

images.name: Team USA hockey [1296x729]
images.caption: Team USA hockey started slow, but roared back to beat Denmark.

images.name: Brock Nelson talks significance of being a third-generation Olympian
images.caption: Emily Kaplan speaks to Brock Nelson, Tage Thompson and Jack Hughes after defeating Latvia.

articles.headline: Marie-Philip Poulin returns; Canada into Olympic semifinals
articles.description: Captain Marie-Philip Poulin returned from injury to score a goal in Canada's 5-1 quarterfinal win over Germany.

articles.headline: Finland's Hiirokoski needs surgery, out of Olympic women's hockey
articles.description: Defender Jenni Hiirikoski's fifth and potentially final Olympic Games are over due to an upper body injury that will require surgery, the Finnish Ice Hockey Association announced.

articles.headline: Stecklein, Heise talk USA hockey's success in 2026 Olympic Winter Games
articles.description: Emily Kaplan interviews Lee Stecklein and Taylor Heise after Team USA advances to the semifinals.

images.name: Stecklein, Heise talk USA hockey's success in 2026 Olympic Winter Games
images.caption: Emily Kaplan interviews Lee Stecklein and Taylor Heise after Team USA advances to the semifinals.

articles.headline: Why Team USA women's hockey biggest threat might be itself?
articles.description: Emily Kaplan breaks down just how talented Team USA women's hockey is in the 2026 Winter Olympics.
